name: geolocation-ai
description: MEOK AI Labs — IP geolocation, distance calculation, timezone lookup, coordinate parsing.

tools.name: geolocate_ip
tools.description: Get approximate location from IP address.

tools.name: calculate_distance
tools.description: Calculate distance between two coordinates using Haversine formula.

tools.name: parse_coordinates
tools.description: Parse location string into lat/lon coordinates.

tools.name: timezone_from_coords
tools.description: Determine timezone from coordinates using brute-force offset matching.

tools.name: ip_to_coordinates
tools.description: Convert IP address to approximate coordinates without full geolocation.
